hero.title: Warm Algarve evenings, shaped by fire, wine and time.
hero.subtitle: A family table in Almancil where Mediterranean calm meets the generosity of picanha, Portuguese wine and long conversations that continue into the evening.
hero.sideText: Close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo, rooted in the relaxed rhythm of the Algarve.
slidesAlt: Fire and signature grill work at Figueiral.
Dining room tables in warm light — atmosphere and service at Figueiral.
Wine at the table — detail, texture, time passing slowly.
Hospitality around the table — people, conversation, ease.

intro.title: A restaurant with the confidence to feel calm, generous and unmistakably local.
intro.body: Restaurante Figueiral brings together the warmth of a family dining room, the glow of the grill and the quiet refinement of a place that has welcomed locals and travellers for decades.

highlights: Mediterranean cooking with a touch of fire from the grill
Portuguese wine chosen for long conversations

statement.text: The atmosphere is not staged. It is built slowly: one welcome, one bottle, one evening at a time.
statement.caption: Almancil hospitality, carried with patience since 1986

atmosphere.line: Tables that linger deep into the night.
atmosphere.imageAlt: Warm light across the dining room as the evening stretches at Restaurante Figueiral.

meat.title: Fire, rhythm and generosity, served without spectacle.
meat.body: The house signature remains Brazilian-style picanha: precise, abundant and deeply convivial. It is a premium meat experience, but the feeling is warmer than formal.
meat.note: The grill gives the evening its pulse; the room keeps it relaxed.

wine.title: Bottles chosen for conversation rather than display.
wine.body: From Portuguese icons to quiet discoveries, wine at Figueiral is there to lengthen the evening: pairing with fire, softening the pace and giving each table its own rhythm.
wine.note: A list for regulars, travellers, celebrations and those who prefer to be guided.

legacy.title: Longevity, here, is not nostalgia. It is the luxury of being trusted.
legacy.body: Figueiral has grown through consistency: familiar faces, returning families, attentive service and the kind of welcome that feels polished without becoming distant.
legacy.imageAlt: Hosts welcoming guests at Restaurante Figueiral.

terrace.title: An Algarve evening with room to breathe.
terrace.body: Warm light, attentive service and the ease of Almancil create a dining atmosphere close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo that feels international, but never anonymous.

cta.title: Reserve a table for fire, wine and an unhurried Algarve evening.
cta.body: For romantic dinners, family celebrations and guests staying near Almancil, Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo.

reviews.title: Long-standing hospitality, remembered long after the evening ends.

items.quote: A timeless Algarve restaurant with exceptional picanha, warm service and a beautiful atmosphere.
items.author: Recent guest

items.quote: Elegant, relaxed and consistently excellent. A must when staying near Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo.
items.author: International traveller

items.quote: A family dining institution in Almancil where hospitality is treated as seriously as the food.
items.author: Algarve dining guide

intro.title: A family restaurant shaped by loyalty, service and the Algarve way of hosting.
intro.body: Figueiral has grown through consistency: welcoming regular guests, international travellers and local families with the same care, warmth and attention to detail.

feature.title: Premium does not need to feel distant. Here, elegance still has a human voice.
feature.body: The philosophy is simple: excellent products, attentive service, relaxed confidence and a dining room that makes guests want to return year after year.

cards.title: Service excellence
cards.body: Attentive without being formal, polished without losing warmth.

cards.title: Long-term loyalty
cards.body: A restaurant remembered by families, returning travellers and local guests.

cards.title: Algarve atmosphere
cards.body: Mediterranean ease, evening light and an elegant relaxed rhythm in Almancil.

intro.title: Fire, wine and Algarve produce served with time.
intro.body: Grill, seafood and desserts made for a long table: olive oil, flame, warm sauces, Portuguese wine and dishes to share.

hero.title: The cooking begins at the grill and ends at the table.
hero.body: From sliced picanha to garlic prawns, grilled fish and house desserts, the menu is designed for long evenings and easy conversation.
hero.note: Choose something from the fire, open a bottle slowly and let the table set the pace.

interludes.title: Direct heat, rested meat and service without rush.
interludes.body: The fire arrives on the plate with restraint: crust, juices and sides that let the product speak.

interludes.title: Portuguese wine, warm bread and dishes to share.
interludes.body: The menu opens up when the bottle follows the rhythm of the conversation.

interludes.title: Chocolate, apple and textures made to extend the evening.
interludes.body: Familiar desserts with a restaurant finish, served without hurry.

categories.title: Signature Meat Experience
categories.description: Cuts chosen for the grill, served with warm sauces, vegetables and table sides.

editorial.label: Technique
editorial.note: Served at temperature, with a clean crust, juices and texture.

items.name: Brazilian-Style Picanha
items.description: The house signature, grilled over fire and served with classic accompaniments.

items.name: Matured Ribeye
items.description: A marbled cut grilled with salt, a marked crust and house sauce.

items.name: Filet Mignon
items.description: Tender and clean, served with seasonal vegetables and warm sauce.

categories.title: From the Algarve
categories.description: Fish, seafood and fresh acidity to bring coastal lightness to the table.

editorial.label: Origin
editorial.note: Olive oil, burnt lemon and herbs in precise, simple seafood dishes.

items.name: Grilled Sea Bass
items.description: Grilled sea bass with Algarve olive oil, herbs and burnt lemon.

items.name: Garlic Prawns
items.description: Hot prawns with garlic, olive oil and live flame, made for sharing.

items.name: Seasonal Market Fish
items.description: Chosen from the best arrival of the day and cooked simply.

categories.title: To Begin
categories.description: The first plates on the table: bread, olive oil, garlic, vegetables and small classics.

editorial.label: Opening
editorial.note: Warm starters and simple textures to meet the first glass.

items.name: Cured Meats & Warm Bread
items.description: Portuguese cured meats, warm bread, olive oil and house preserves.

items.name: Burrata with Roasted Tomatoes
items.description: Creamy burrata with roasted tomatoes, basil and toasted walnut.

items.name: Fire-Roasted Vegetables
items.description: Seasonal vegetables roasted over fire with smoked yoghurt and herbs.

categories.title: Desserts
categories.description: Endings with chocolate, apple, almond and Port wine.

editorial.label: Finish
editorial.note: Desserts to share or pair with a small glass at the end of the night.

items.name: Caramelised Creme Brulee
items.description: Silky custard, burnt sugar and light citrus notes.

items.name: Chocolate & Port Wine
items.description: Dark chocolate in different textures with a touch of Port wine.

items.name: Algarve Almond Tart
items.description: Warm Algarve almond tart with vanilla cream.

intro.title: A wine restaurant in the Algarve where pairing feels personal, not performative.
intro.body: The wine service at Figueiral is built around the table: what guests are celebrating, what they are eating and how the evening should unfold.

feature.title: Portuguese depth, Mediterranean brightness and bottles for memorable evenings.
feature.body: The list is imagined for expressive pairings with fire-grilled meat, Brazilian-style picanha, Algarve seafood and relaxed hospitality.

moments: Portuguese reds for premium picanha and steak
Elegant whites for Algarve fish and terrace lunches
Celebration bottles for romantic dinners and private occasions

intro.body: A visual expression of premium Mediterranean hospitality: fire, wine, atmosphere and generous service.
